  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Mechanic Engineer",
  "description": "Mikano International is Nigerian company in the power generation, automobile, steel fabrication sectors. This company offers sales, maintenance, assembly and distribution of power generation products.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Mechanic Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ogba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Qualification: OND/HND/BSc
	Experience: 3-5 years of experience in servicing and troubleshooting in Gen-Sets Production.


Benefits


	Salary: N160,000 - N240,000 / month.
	Leave allowance, HMO &amp; Pension.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CVs to:&nbsp;careers@mikano-intl.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Mechanic Engineer Job at Mikano International




        
    

        
        Mikano International is Nigerian company in the power generation, automobile, steel fabrication sectors. This company offers sales, maintenance, assembly and distribution of power generation products.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Mechanic Engineer

Job Location: Ogba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Qualification: OND/HND/BSc
	Experience: 3-5 years of experience in servicing and troubleshooting in Gen-Sets Production.


Benefits
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Salary: N160,000 - N240,000 / month.
	Leave allowance, HMO & Pension.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CVs to: careers@mikano-intl.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales and Marketing Personnel",
  "description": "Internet Service is a&nbsp;telecommunication company that provides internet services to individuals and businesses. Our focus is on delivering reliable, fast, and affordable internet solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales and Marketing Personnel
Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	A Sales Executive is responsible for promoting and selling a company&rsquo;s products or services to customers.
	They help the company grow by attracting new clients and maintaining good relationships with existing customers.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and reach out to potential customers
	Present and promote company products or services
	Meet sales targets and objectives
	Build and maintain strong customer relationships
	Respond to customer inquiries and provide product information
	Prepare sales reports and update customer records
	Work with the marketing team to improve sales strategies


Qualifications


	Minimum of OND/HND/Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in any related field
	Previous sales experience is an added advantage


Required Skills:


	Good communication and negotiation skills
	Ability to persuade and convince customers
	Strong interpersonal skills
	Ability to meet targets and work under pressure
	Basic knowledge of sales and marketing.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;preciousbamigboye4@gmail.com&nbsp;using&nbsp;&quot;Sales and Marketing Personnel&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Sales and Marketing Personnel Job at Internet Service




        
    

        
        Internet Service is a telecommunication company that provides internet services to individuals and businesses. Our focus is on delivering reliable, fast, and affordable internet solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales and Marketing Personnel
Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	A Sales Executive is responsible for promoting and selling a company’s products or services to customers.
	They help the company grow by attracting new clients and maintaining good relationships with existing customers.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and reach out to potential customers
	Present and promote company products or services
	Meet sales targets and objectives
	Build and maintain strong customer relationships
	Respond to customer inquiries and provide product information
	Prepare sales reports and update customer records
	Work with the marketing team to improve sales strategies


Qualifications


	Minimum of OND/HND/Bachelor’s degree in any related field
	Previous sales experience is an added advantage


Required Skills:


	Good communication and negotiation skills
	Ability to persuade and convince customers
	Strong interpersonal skills
	Ability to meet targets and work under pressure
	Basic knowledge of sales and marketing.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: preciousbamigboye4@gmail.com using "Sales and Marketing Personnel" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "IT Specialist",
  "description": "EPCM Engineers Limited - From the early stages of an engineering project, our experienced engineers provide expertise needed to derive optimal project definitions in a robust application of the conceptual design and selection process.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Specialist

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;

Requirements


	Applicants shouldn&rsquo;t be above 30 years as at March 17, 2026.
	Experienced applicants shall be considered on target skills and competencies.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their&nbsp;electronic application&nbsp;to:&nbsp;humanresource@epcmengineers.com&nbsp;using &quot;Age / degree / year of graduation/position title&quot; as the subject of the email.&nbsp;Example:&nbsp;23 / BSc / 2017 / Computer Science / University of Nigeria Nsukka.

Note


	Only shortlisted candidates shall be invited for interviews.
	Only applications received on the provided email address shall be considered for evaluation.
	Apply with your resume, for the position and also submit a one-page summary of your basis for applying for the position.

IT Specialist Job at EPCM Engineers Limited




        
    

        
        EPCM Engineers Limited - From the early stages of an engineering project, our experienced engineers provide expertise needed to derive optimal project definitions in a robust application of the conceptual design and selection process.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Specialist

Job Location: Lagos 

Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Applicants shouldn’t be above 30 years as at March 17, 2026.
	Experienced applicants shall be considered on target skills and competencies.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their electronic application to: humanresource@epcmengineers.com using "Age / degree / year of graduation/position title" as the subject of the email. Example: 23 / BSc / 2017 / Computer Science / University of Nigeria Nsukka.

Note


	Only shortlisted candidates shall be invited for interviews.
	Only applications received on the provided email address shall be considered for evaluation.
	Apply with your resume, for the position and also submit a one-page summary of your basis for applying for the position.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Virtual Assistant",
  "description": "Belton Global Concern Limited offers a wide range of services some of which are the Sales, Production and Installation services.&nbsp;&lrm;Sales Department offers the sales of building materials such as Executive jaccuzzi, steamers, shower rooms, hot tubs, saunas with out standing features(massagers, radios and so on), shower cubicules, shower trays, power showers, standing showers and elevated showers of different colours, designs and sizes, cover baths, fibre baths, bath mixers, assorted brands of ceramic toilet seats &amp; bath tubs, bidet, uriners, bathroom accessories, 3-step towel rails, glass basins, glass block, glass shelves, designed mirrors, soap dish, unique toilet brushes &amp; foot mats, different brands &amp; liters of water heater and over head tanks, swimming pool materials, bore hole materials, squats, PVC.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Virtual Assistant
Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a Virtual Assistant to provide administrative support to our team while working remotely.
	As a Virtual Assistant, you will perform various administrative tasks, including answering emails, scheduling meetings and making travel arrangements. For this role, a strong Internet connection is required, along with experience using communication tools like Skype.
	Ultimately, you should be able to handle administrative projects and deliver high-quality work under minimum supervision.


Responsibilities


	Respond to emails and phone calls
	Schedule meetings
	Book travel and accommodations
	Manage a contact list
	Prepare customer spreadsheets and keep online records
	Organize managers&rsquo; calendars
	Perform market research
	Create presentations, as assigned
	Address employees administrative queries
	Provide customer service as first point of contact


Requirements and skills


	Proven experience as a Virtual Assistant or relevant role
	Familiarity with current technologies, like desktop sharing, cloud services and VoIP
	Experience with word-processing software and spreadsheets (e.g. MS Office)
	Knowledge of online calendars and scheduling (e.g. Google Calendar)
	Excellent phone, email and instant messaging communication skills
	Excellent time management skills
	Solid organizational skills.


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Documents&nbsp;to:&nbsp;beltongloballimited@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",

  },

      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },

    "value": "195496"
  },

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",

      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 75000,
      "maxValue": 150000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Virtual Assistant Job at Belton Global Concern Limited




        
    

        
        
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    

Belton Global Concern Limited offers a wide range of services some of which are the Sales, Production and Installation services. ‎Sales Department offers the sales of building materials such as Executive jaccuzzi, steamers, shower rooms, hot tubs, saunas with out standing features(massagers, radios and so on), shower cubicules, shower trays, power showers, standing showers and elevated showers of different colours, designs and sizes, cover baths, fibre baths, bath mixers, assorted brands of ceramic toilet seats & bath tubs, bidet, uriners, bathroom accessories, 3-step towel rails, glass basins, glass block, glass shelves, designed mirrors, soap dish, unique toilet brushes & foot mats, different brands & liters of water heater and over head tanks, swimming pool materials, bore hole materials, squats, PVC.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Virtual Assistant
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a Virtual Assistant to provide administrative support to our team while working remotely.
	As a Virtual Assistant, you will perform various administrative tasks, including answering emails, scheduling meetings and making travel arrangements. For this role, a strong Internet connection is required, along with experience using communication tools like Skype.
	Ultimately, you should be able to handle administrative projects and deliver high-quality work under minimum supervision.


Responsibilities


	Respond to emails and phone calls
	Schedule meetings
	Book travel and accommodations
	Manage a contact list
	Prepare customer spreadsheets and keep online records
	Organize managers’ calendars
	Perform market research
	Create presentations, as assigned
	Address employees administrative queries
	Provide customer service as first point of contact


Requirements and skills


	Proven experience as a Virtual Assistant or relevant role
	Familiarity with current technologies, like desktop sharing, cloud services and VoIP
	Experience with word-processing software and spreadsheets (e.g. MS Office)
	Knowledge of online calendars and scheduling (e.g. Google Calendar)
	Excellent phone, email and instant messaging communication skills
	Excellent time management skills
	Solid organizational skills.


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Documents to: beltongloballimited@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Account Officer",
  "description": "Clinora Health Group is dedicated to providing high-quality healthcare that is ethical and accessible. Our focus on prevention, education, and effective treatment guarantees that our patients receive the best care possible.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:Account Officer
Job Location:&nbsp;Osogbo, Osun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	An Account Officer is responsible for managing financial records, preparing reports, handling transactions, and ensuring accurate accounting processes within an organization.


Key&nbsp;Responsibilities


	Maintain and update financial records and accounts.
	Prepare invoices, receipts, and payment vouchers.
	Monitor company expenses and income.
	Reconcile bank statements and company accounts.
	Prepare financial reports and assist in budgeting.
	Ensure compliance with financial policies and regulations.
	Assist with audits and tax documentation.
	Manage petty cash and daily financial transactions.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.
	Basic knowledge of accounting principles.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software.
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy.
	Good communication and organizational skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;clinorahg@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-01",

  },

Account Officer Job at Clinora Health Group




        
    

        
        Clinora Health Group is dedicated to providing high-quality healthcare that is ethical and accessible. Our focus on prevention, education, and effective treatment guarantees that our patients receive the best care possible.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:Account Officer
Job Location: Osogbo, Osun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	An Account Officer is responsible for managing financial records, preparing reports, handling transactions, and ensuring accurate accounting processes within an organization.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Maintain and update financial records and accounts.
	Prepare invoices, receipts, and payment vouchers.
	Monitor company expenses and income.
	Reconcile bank statements and company accounts.
	Prepare financial reports and assist in budgeting.
	Ensure compliance with financial policies and regulations.
	Assist with audits and tax documentation.
	Manage petty cash and daily financial transactions.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.
	Basic knowledge of accounting principles.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software.
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy.
	Good communication and organizational skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: clinorahg@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
